title: Cheating Cheaters
writer: Walter Anthony, Charles Logue, Max Marcin
actors: Betty Compson, Kenneth Harlan, Sylvia Ashton
plot: The Palmers, an apparently wealthy family, move into the house next- door to the Lazarres. However, the Palmers are actually a gang of thieves plotting to rob the Lazarres. What the Palmers don't realize is that the Lazarres are a...
